args:
Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Routing Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/trie-router/node.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts

- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase, sets up routing with a default SmartRouter combining RegExpRouter and TrieRouter, and exports the Hono class with generic type parameters for environment and schema.
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, Router
- Simple note: Default constructor creates SmartRouter with [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter] fallback chain.

## src/hono-base.ts

- Purpose: Base module containing Hono class implementation with routing core, HTTP method handlers (get, post, put, delete, etc.), middleware support via use(), and request dispatch through router.match().
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, Router, Context, Context, compose, getPath, mergePath, RouterRoute, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, FetchEventLike, MiddlewareHandler, NotFoundHandler, errorHandler
- Simple note: Implements chainable API for route registration and uses #dispatch() to call router.match() and compose middleware.

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Barrel export file for PatternRouter that re-exports the PatternRouter class from router.ts.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter
- Simple note: Single export statement forwarding to router implementation.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter using compiled RegExp patterns, supports wildcard matching with /*, optional parameters with ?, and transforms path segments into regex for fast matching.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams, Route
- Simple note: Converts paths to regex with /:name and /* patterns, stores compiled patterns in #routes array.

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Barrel export file for LinearRouter that re-exports LinearRouter class from router.ts.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter
- Simple note: Single export statement forwarding to router implementation.

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter with linear iteration through stored routes, supports wildcard *, label patterns :name with optional regex constraints, and exact path matching without compilation overhead.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, ROUTES_LOOP, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, emptyParams, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe
- Simple note: Uses linear route iteration with explicit label and wildcard handling, no regex compilation during add().

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Barrel export file for RegExpRouter family that exports RegExpRouter class and PreparedRegExpRouter with buildInitParams/serializeInitParams for serialization.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
- Simple note: Exports core router and optimized serialized version for deployment.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements RegExpRouter using Trie structure to build combined regex patterns, stores routes in middleware and routes dictionaries, and builds matchers lazily on first match.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, ParamIndexMap, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, PATH_ERROR, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, nullMatcher, wildcardRegExpCache, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, buildAllMatchers, #buildMatcher, add, match
- Simple note: Builds compiled regex from Trie on first match, caches middleware and routes in internal maps.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts

- Purpose: Defines Matcher interface and match function for RegExpRouter's return type [RegExp, HandlerData[], StaticMap], includes emptyParam for no-match case.
- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, emptyParam, match, ParamStash
- Simple note: Provides match function that returns regex, handler data array, and static path map.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts

- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter with pre-built matchers and relocateMap for optimized lookup, supports adding paths dynamically after initial build using indexes and param maps.
- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, MatcherMap, Matcher, StaticMap, Router, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, emptyParam, match, #addWildcard, #addPath
- Simple note: Takes pre-computed matchers and relocateMap in constructor, uses indexes for fast path addition.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Implements Node class for Trie structure with recursive insert building regex strings, tracks #index for route endpoints and #varIndex for parameter mapping, and sorts child keys for consistent output.
- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars, compareKey, insert, buildRegExpStr
- Simple note: Trie node recursively builds regex alternation with literal, pattern, and wildcard keys.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts

- Purpose: Implements Trie class with #root Node and context tracking for parameter indices, handles path groups with named placeholders, and builds regex with replacement maps for handler and param indices.
- Names noticed: Trie, Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, PATH_ERROR, insert, buildRegExp, #root
- Simple note: Replaces named groups {pattern} with markers before Trie insertion, generates replacement maps for final regex.

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Barrel export file for SmartRouter that re-exports SmartRouter class from router.ts.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter
- Simple note: Single export statement forwarding to router implementation.

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter that sequentially tries multiple routers, caches the first successful router as activeRouter, and uses UnsupportedPathError to continue trying next router when one fails.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, #routers, #routes, activeRouter, buildAllMatchers, add, match
- Simple name note: Tries routers in order, adopts first working router and binds its match function.

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Barrel export file for TrieRouter that re-exports TrieRouter class from router.ts.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter
- Simple note: Single export statement forwarding to router implementation.

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements TrieRouter using recursive Node tree with #children for path segments and #methods per node for multiple HTTP verbs, uses checkOptionalParameter for /* patterns.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router, Node, checkOptionalParameter, insert, search, #node, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL
- Simple note: Direct Trie-based routing with per-node method mapping, matches via recursive node traversal.

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Implements Node class for Trie-based router with #children for path segments, #methods mapping handlers per method, and #patterns for regex-based segments, uses queue-based search with handler accumulation.
- Names noticed: Node, Router, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, hasChildren, insert, #pushHandlerSets, search, #params
- Simple note: Matches via breadth-first queue traversal, accumulates handler sets for multi-match support.

## src/router/common.case.test.ts

- Purpose: Contains runTest helper for shared test suite across routers, validates basic usage, reserved words, complex patterns, registration order, multi-match scenarios, duplicate param names, and various edge cases.
- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, Vitest, getSuiteHierarchy, runTest, skip, newRouter, Params, Router, ParamIndexMap, match, Handler, Basic Usage, Reserved Words, Complex, Registration Order, Multi match, Duplicate param name
- Simple note: Defines common test cases that all routers should pass, parameterized with router instantiation.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests PatternRouter implementation by extending common case tests, adds skip for UnsupportedPath errors, includes duplicate param name and trailing slash specific tests.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Pattern, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip
- Simple note: Pattern-specific tests skip complex multi-match cases, validates leading/trailing slash handling.

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests LinearRouter implementation by extending common case tests, adds skip for UnsupportedPath errors in multi-match params, includes skip for trailing slash support, adds specific test for unsupported label+wildcard combo.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip, Multi match, Trailing slash, Skip part
- Simple note: Skips label+star combo which throws UnsupportedPathError, tests optional parameter support.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests RegExpRouter implementation by extending common case tests, adds skip for unsupported patterns, includes tests for return type, UnsupportedPathError for ambiguous patterns, and complex capturing group validation.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip, Return value type, Ambiguous, Static and dynamic, Capture Group, Complex capturing group
- Simple note: Validates ambiguous pattern detection, tests regex construction and parameter stash extraction.

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests SmartRouter implementation by using common case tests with RegExpRouter + TrieRouter combination, verifies router selection and chaining behavior.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest
- Simple note: SmartRouter delegates to first successful router, inherits all tests via runTest.

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests TrieRouter implementation by extending common case tests with newRouter using TrieRouter, validates all standard router behaviors.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest
- Simple note: Full common test suite coverage for Trie-based routing.

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests Node class from trie-router with root node behavior, basic usage, named parameters, wildcards, regex patterns, multi-match scenarios, sort order, duplicate param handling, and routing order.
- Names noticed: Node, Root Node, Basic Usage, Name path, Name path - Multiple route, Param prefix, Named params and a wildcard, Wildcard, Regexp, All, Special Wildcard, Default with wildcard, Multi match, Duplicate param name, Sort Order, star, Routing order With named parameters
- Simple note: Exhaustive Node-level tests covering all TrieRouter features and edge cases.

## Cross-File Checklist

- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

### Files Created

- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

